info.title: AgentMail API
info.description: AgentMail email API endpoints exposed through the AIsa unified gateway. Adapted from the upstream docs.agentmail.to OpenAPI spec.

human_email.description: Email address of the human who owns the agent. A 6-digit OTP will be sent to this address.

username.description: Username for the auto-created inbox (e.g. "my-agent" creates my-agent@agentmail.to).

source.description:
The SDK, framework, or platform issuing this sign-up (e.g. `agentmail-python`, `agentmail-cli`, `agentmail-mcp`).
Identifies the caller — answers "who is signing up".
Max 2048 characters.

referrer.description:
The channel that drove this sign-up — where the agent or its developer discovered AgentMail
(e.g. `agent.email`, a partner URL, a campaign tag). Answers "where did this sign-up come from".
Max 2048 characters.

type_agent_AgentSignupRequest.description: Request body to sign up an agent.
type_agent_AgentSignupRequest.title: AgentSignupRequest

api_key.description: API key for authenticating subsequent requests. Store this securely, it cannot be retrieved again.

x-doc.desc_en: Machine-readable error name identifying the validation failure.
x-doc.title_zh: 标识本次校验失败的机器可读错误名。

x-doc.desc_en: Details of the validation problems with the query parameters.
x-doc.title_zh: 查询参数校验问题的明细。

otp_code.description: 6-digit verification code sent to the human's email address.

type_agent_AgentVerifyRequest.description: Request body to verify an agent with an OTP code.
type_agent_AgentVerifyRequest.title: AgentVerifyRequest

type__Limit.description: Limit of number of items returned.
type__Limit.title: Limit

type_inboxes_MetadataValue.description: A metadata value. May be a string, number, or boolean.
type_inboxes_MetadataValue.title: MetadataValue

type_inboxes_Metadata.description:
Custom key-value pairs attached to the inbox. Up to 256 keys. Keys and
string values are each limited to 256 characters. When updating metadata,
send a key with a null value to remove that key.
type_inboxes_Metadata.title: Metadata

metadata.description: Custom metadata attached to the inbox.

updated_at.description: Time at which inbox was last updated.

created_at.description: Time at which inbox was created.

x-doc.desc_en: Machine-readable error name identifying the failure.
x-doc.title_zh: 标识此次失败的机器可读错误名。

x-doc.desc_en: Human-readable description of the error.
x-doc.title_zh: 面向人类的错误描述。

username.description: Username of address. Randomly generated if not specified.

domain.description: Domain of address. Must be verified domain. Defaults to `agentmail.to`.

metadata.description: Custom metadata to attach to the inbox.

type_inboxes_UpdateMetadata.description:
Custom key-value pairs to merge into the inbox's existing metadata. A
value may be a string, number, boolean, or null. Setting a key to null
removes it. Up to 256 keys; keys and string values are each limited to
256 characters.
type_inboxes_UpdateMetadata.title: UpdateMetadata

metadata.description:
Metadata to merge into the inbox's existing metadata. Keys you include
are added or overwritten; keys you omit are left unchanged. To remove a
single key, send it with a null value. To clear all metadata, send
`metadata` as null. Sending an empty object is rejected; use null to
clear. Each update must include at least one of `display_name` or
`metadata`.

type__Before.description: Timestamp before which to filter by.
type__Before.title: Before

type__After.description: Timestamp after which to filter by.
type__After.title: After

type_threads_ThreadTimestamp.description: Timestamp of last sent or received message.
type_threads_ThreadTimestamp.title: ThreadTimestamp

type_threads_ThreadSenders.description: Senders in thread. In format `username@domain.com` or `Display Name <username@domain.com>`.
type_threads_ThreadSenders.title: ThreadSenders

type_threads_ThreadRecipients.description: Recipients in thread. In format `username@domain.com` or `Display Name <username@domain.com>`.
type_threads_ThreadRecipients.title: ThreadRecipients

type_threads_ThreadPreview.description: Text preview of last message in thread.
type_threads_ThreadPreview.title: ThreadPreview

x-doc.desc_en: How the attachment is presented: `inline` (rendered within the body, e.g. an embedded image) or `attachment` (a downloadable file).

messages.description: Messages in thread. Ordered by `timestamp` ascending.

x-doc.desc_en: Full messages of the thread in chronological order, each with bodies and attachments.
x-doc.title_zh: 对话内的完整消息，按时间先后排列，每条含正文与附件。

x-doc.title_zh: Content-ID，用于在 HTML 正文中引用内嵌附件。

x-doc.desc_en: Time-limited presigned URL to download the attachment binary. Fetch the file before `expires_at`.
x-doc.title_zh: 限时预签名下载链接，用于下载附件二进制内容。请在 `expires_at` 之前完成下载。

expires_at.description: Time at which the download URL expires.

x-doc.desc_en: When the download URL expires and stops working.
x-doc.title_zh: 下载链接失效的时间。

add_labels.description: Labels to add to thread. Cannot be system labels.

x-doc.desc_en: Custom labels to apply to the thread. System labels are not allowed.
x-doc.title_zh: 要为对话添加的自定义标签。不允许使用系统标签。

remove_labels.description: Labels to remove from thread. Cannot be system labels. Takes priority over `add_labels` (in the event of duplicate labels passed in).

x-doc.desc_en: Custom labels to remove from the thread. System labels are not allowed. If the same label appears in both lists, removal wins.
x-doc.title_zh: 要从对话移除的自定义标签。不允许使用系统标签。若同一标签同时出现在两个列表，以移除为准。

x-doc.desc_en: ID of the updated thread.
x-doc.title_zh: 已更新对话的 ID。

x-doc.desc_en: The thread's complete label set after the update.
x-doc.title_zh: 更新后对话的完整标签集合。

type_messages_BatchGetMessagesMessageIds.description:
IDs of messages to fetch. Maximum 500 ids per request. Duplicates are
rejected with a validation error. IDs not found in the inbox (including
cross-inbox or permission-restricted) are silently omitted from the
response; callers detect misses by comparing `count` against `limit`.
type_messages_BatchGetMessagesMessageIds.title: BatchGetMessagesMessageIds

messages.description:
Found messages. Order matches `message_ids` in the request. Body
fields (`text`, `html`, `extracted_text`, `extracted_html`) are
never populated; use the single-message endpoint to retrieve bodies.

size.description: Size of the raw message in bytes.

download_url.description: S3 presigned URL to download the raw message. Expires at expires_at.

expires_at.description: Time at which the download URL expires.

type_messages_RawMessageResponse.description: S3 presigned URL to download the raw .eml file.
type_messages_RawMessageResponse.title: RawMessageResponse

add_labels.description: Label or labels to add to message.

remove_labels.description: Label or labels to remove from message.

entry.description: Email address or domain of list entry.

type_metrics_MetricEventTypes.title: MetricEventTypes

type_metrics_MetricLimit.title: MetricLimit

count.description: Count of events in the bucket.

type_inbox-events_InboxEventType.description:
Type of inbox event. Wire format is dot.case to match the
convention used by webhook events (`message.received`,
`domain.verified`, etc. in events.yml). Pre-2026-04 these were
`label_added`/`label_removed` (snake_case). The Fern enum's `name`
field stays uppercase-snake (Fern convention); only the wire
`value` changed.
type_inbox-events_InboxEventType.title: InboxEventType

event_at.description: Time at which the event occurred.

created_at.description: Time at which the event was recorded.

type_api-keys_ApiKeyPermissions.description: Granular permissions for the API key. When ommitted all permissions are granted. Otherwise, only permissions set to true are granted.
type_api-keys_ApiKeyPermissions.title: ApiKeyPermissions

type_api-keys_CreatedAt.description: Time at which api key was created.
type_api-keys_CreatedAt.title: CreatedAt

pod_id.description: Pod ID the api key is scoped to. If set, the key can only access resources within this pod.

inbox_id.description: Inbox ID the api key is scoped to. If set, the key can only access resources within this inbox.

used_at.description: Time at which api key was last used.

pod_id.description: Pod ID the api key is scoped to.

inbox_id.description: Inbox ID the api key is scoped to.

type_events_EventTypes.description: Event types for which to send events.
type_events_EventTypes.title: EventTypes

type_events_PodIds.description: Pods for which to send events. Maximum 10 per webhook.
type_events_PodIds.title: PodIds

type_events_InboxIds.description: Inboxes for which to send events. Maximum 10 per webhook.
type_events_InboxIds.title: InboxIds

updated_at.description: Time at which webhook was last updated.

created_at.description: Time at which webhook was created.

event_types.description:
Full list of event types this webhook should receive. At least one type is required. Send every type you
want in this array (not incremental). See [Webhooks overview](https://docs.agentmail.to/webhooks-overview)
for spam, blocked, and unauthenticated events and required permissions.

add_inbox_ids.description: Inbox IDs to subscribe to the webhook.

remove_inbox_ids.description: Inbox IDs to unsubscribe from the webhook.

add_pod_ids.description: Pod IDs to subscribe to the webhook.

remove_pod_ids.description: Pod IDs to unsubscribe from the webhook.

event_types.description:
When you send a non-empty list, it replaces the webhook's subscribed event types in full (the same
"set the list" behavior as create). It is not a merge or diff: include every event type you want after
the update. Sending a one-element array means the webhook will only receive that one type afterward.
Omit this field or send an empty array to leave event types unchanged. Clearing all types with an empty
list is not supported. Subscribing to `message.received.spam`, `message.received.blocked`, or
`message.received.unauthenticated` requires the matching label permission on the API key.

type_domains_FeedbackEnabled.description: Bounce and complaint notifications are sent to your inboxes.
type_domains_FeedbackEnabled.title: FeedbackEnabled

updated_at.description: Time at which the domain was last updated.

created_at.description: Time at which the domain was created.

type_domains_Status.description: The verification status of the domain.
type_domains_Status.title: Status

type.description: The type of the DNS record.

name.description: The name or host of the record.

status.description: The verification status of this specific record.

priority.description: The priority of the MX record.

records.description: A list of DNS records required to verify the domain.

updated_at.description: Time at which the domain was last updated.

created_at.description: Time at which the domain was created.

entry.description: Email address or domain of list entry.

x-doc.desc_en: The email address or domain of the list entry.
x-doc.title_zh: 名单条目的邮箱地址或域名。

x-doc.title_zh: 名单条目所属的组织 ID。

x-doc.desc_en: Free-text reason recorded when the entry was added.
x-doc.title_zh: 添加该条目时记录的自由文本原因。

x-doc.desc_en: Traffic direction the entry governs: `send`, `receive`, or `reply`.

x-doc.desc_en: Whether this is an `allow` or `block` list entry.
x-doc.title_zh: 该条目属于 `allow` 还是 `block` 名单。

x-doc.desc_en: Whether the entry matches a single `email` address or an entire `domain`.
x-doc.title_zh: 条目匹配单个 `email` 地址还是整个 `domain`。

created_at.description: Time at which entry was created.

x-doc.desc_en: When the resource was created.
x-doc.title_zh: 资源创建时间。

read_only.description: Whether the entry is read-only and cannot be deleted via the API.

x-doc.desc_en: When true, the entry is system-managed and cannot be deleted through the API.
x-doc.title_zh: 为 true 时，条目由系统管理，不能通过 API 删除。

x-doc.desc_en: Number of items returned in this page.
x-doc.title_zh: 本页返回的条目数。

x-doc.desc_en: The limit that was applied to this page.
x-doc.title_zh: 本页实际生效的数量上限。

x-doc.desc_en: Cursor for the next page; pass it back as `page_token`. Absent or empty when there are no more pages.
x-doc.title_zh: 下一页的游标；作为 `page_token` 回传。无更多页时缺省或为空。

x-doc.desc_en: The page of allow/block list entries, ordered by entry ascending.
x-doc.title_zh: 本页允许/拦截名单条目，按条目升序排列。

updated_at.description: Time at which pod was last updated.

created_at.description: Time at which pod was created.

updated_at.description: Time at which organization was last updated.

created_at.description: Time at which organization was created.

type_organizations_Organization.description: Organization details with usage limits and counts.
type_organizations_Organization.title: Organization

type_events_MessageReceivedEvent.description: A message was received. Spam, blocked, and unauthenticated received-message events use the same payload shape with different `event_type` values.
type_events_MessageReceivedEvent.title: MessageReceivedEvent

x-doc.desc_en: ID of the thread to fetch. Obtain it from the `thread_id` field of a list-threads result or a send/reply response.
x-doc.title_zh: 要获取的对话 ID。可从列出对话的结果或发送/回复响应的 `thread_id` 字段获得。

x-doc.desc_en: Bearer token for authentication, sent as `Bearer <api_key>`. Keep the key secret; never log it in plaintext.
x-doc.title_zh: 用于鉴权的 Bearer 令牌，格式为 `Bearer <api_key>`。请妥善保密，切勿明文记录。

x-doc.heading_zh: 按 ID 获取单个资源 get
x-doc.desc_en: Fetch a single resource by its ID. This operationId is shared by three endpoints: get a thread (with its full message list) by `thread_id`, get a draft by `draft_id`, and get one allow/block list entry by `direction`/`type`/`entry`. The path determines which resource and response shape you receive.
x-doc.description_zh: 按 ID 获取单个资源。该 operationId 由三个端点共用：按 `thread_id` 获取对话（含完整消息列表）、按 `draft_id` 获取草稿、按 `direction`/`type`/`entry` 获取单条允许/拦截名单条目。具体取哪种资源及返回结构由请求路径决定。

patch.description: Updates thread labels. Cannot add or remove system labels (sent, received, bounced, etc.). Rejects requests with a `422` for threads with 100 or more messages.

x-doc.desc_en: ID of the thread whose labels are being updated.
x-doc.title_zh: 要更新标签的对话 ID。

x-doc.desc_en: Bearer token for authentication, sent as `Bearer <api_key>`. Keep the key secret.
x-doc.title_zh: 用于鉴权的 Bearer 令牌，格式为 `Bearer <api_key>`。请妥善保密。

x-doc.desc_en: Update a thread's labels by adding and/or removing custom labels. System labels (sent, received, bounced, etc.) cannot be changed, and threads with 100 or more messages are rejected with 422.
x-doc.description_zh: 更新对话标签：增加和/或移除自定义标签。系统标签（sent、received、bounced 等）不可改动；消息数达 100 条及以上的对话会以 422 拒绝。

delete.description:
Moves the thread to trash by adding a trash label to all messages. If the thread is already in trash, it will be permanently deleted. Use `permanent=true` to force permanent deletion.

**CLI:**
```bash
agentmail threads delete --thread-id <thread_id>
```

x-doc.desc_en: ID of the thread to delete (trash, or permanently delete if already trashed or `permanent=true`).
x-doc.title_zh: 要删除的对话 ID（移入回收站；若已在回收站或 `permanent=true` 则永久删除）。

parameters.name: permanent
parameters.description: If true, permanently delete the thread instead of moving to trash.

x-doc.desc_en: When true, permanently delete the thread immediately instead of moving it to trash.
x-doc.title_zh: 为 true 时立即永久删除对话，而非移入回收站。

x-doc.desc_en: Bearer token for authentication, sent as `Bearer <api_key>`. Keep the key secret.
x-doc.title_zh: 用于鉴权的 Bearer 令牌，格式为 `Bearer <api_key>`。请妥善保密。

x-doc.heading_zh: 按 ID 删除资源 delete
x-doc.desc_en: Delete a resource by its ID. Shared by two endpoints: delete a thread (moves it to trash, or permanently removes it when already trashed or when `permanent=true`) and delete one allow/block list entry. Read-only system entries cannot be deleted.
x-doc.description_zh: 按 ID 删除资源。由两个端点共用：删除对话（移入回收站；若已在回收站或 `permanent=true` 则永久删除）、删除单条允许/拦截名单条目。只读的系统条目无法删除。

x-doc.desc_en: Traffic direction of the list to read: `send`, `receive`, or `reply`. (List-entries endpoint only.)
x-doc.title_zh: 要读取的名单流量方向：`send`、`receive` 或 `reply`。（仅名单条目端点）

x-doc.desc_en: Whether to read the `allow` or `block` list. (List-entries endpoint only.)
x-doc.title_zh: 读取 `allow` 还是 `block` 名单。（仅名单条目端点）

x-doc.desc_en: Maximum number of items to return in this page.
x-doc.title_zh: 本页返回的最大条目数。

x-doc.desc_en: Pagination cursor. Pass the `next_page_token` from the previous response to fetch the next page; omit for the first page.
x-doc.title_zh: 分页游标。传入上一次响应的 `next_page_token` 以取下一页；首页可不传。

x-doc.desc_en: Bearer token for authentication, sent as `Bearer <api_key>`. Keep the key secret.
x-doc.title_zh: 用于鉴权的 Bearer 令牌，格式为 `Bearer <api_key>`。请妥善保密。

x-doc.desc_en: List resources with cursor pagination. This operationId is shared by three endpoints: list threads, list drafts, and list allow/block list entries. Supports time/label filters where applicable; iterate with `next_page_token` to walk all pages.
x-doc.description_zh: 分页列出资源（基于游标）。该 operationId 由三个端点共用：列出对话、列出草稿、列出允许/拦截名单条目。在适用处支持时间与标签筛选；通过 `next_page_token` 翻页可遍历全部结果。

x-doc.desc_en: Traffic direction the new entry should govern: `send`, `receive`, or `reply`.
x-doc.title_zh: 新条目作用的流量方向：`send`、`receive` 或 `reply`。

x-doc.desc_en: Whether to add the entry to the `allow` or `block` list.
x-doc.title_zh: 将条目加入 `allow` 还是 `block` 名单。

x-doc.desc_en: Bearer token for authentication, sent as `Bearer <api_key>`. Keep the key secret.
x-doc.title_zh: 用于鉴权的 Bearer 令牌，格式为 `Bearer <api_key>`。请妥善保密。

x-doc.desc_en: Add an email address or domain to an allow/block list, scoped by the `direction` and `type` path parameters. Returns the created entry.
x-doc.description_zh: 向允许/拦截名单新增一个邮箱地址或域名，作用范围由路径参数 `direction` 与 `type` 决定。返回新建的条目。

x-doc.desc_en: Maximum number of items to return in this page.
x-doc.title_zh: 本页返回的最大条目数。

x-doc.desc_en: Pagination cursor. Pass the `next_page_token` from the previous response to fetch the next page; omit for the first page.
x-doc.title_zh: 分页游标。传入上一次响应的 `next_page_token` 以取下一页；首页可不传。

x-doc.desc_en: Restrict results to items carrying all of these labels.
x-doc.title_zh: 仅返回带有全部这些标签的条目。

x-doc.desc_en: Only return items with a timestamp before this moment.
x-doc.title_zh: 仅返回时间戳早于该时刻的条目。

x-doc.desc_en: Only return items with a timestamp after this moment.
x-doc.title_zh: 仅返回时间戳晚于该时刻的条目。

x-doc.desc_en: When true, return items in ascending time order instead of the default newest-first.
x-doc.title_zh: 为 true 时按时间升序返回，而非默认的最新优先。

x-doc.desc_en: When true, include items labeled spam in the results.
x-doc.title_zh: 为 true 时在结果中包含被标记为垃圾邮件（spam）的条目。

x-doc.desc_en: When true, include items labeled blocked in the results.
x-doc.title_zh: 为 true 时在结果中包含被标记为拦截（blocked）的条目。

x-doc.desc_en: When true, include items from unauthenticated senders in the results.
x-doc.title_zh: 为 true 时在结果中包含来自未通过认证发件人的条目。

x-doc.desc_en: When true, include items in trash in the results.
x-doc.title_zh: 为 true 时在结果中包含回收站（trash）内的条目。

x-doc.desc_en: Bearer token for authentication, sent as `Bearer <api_key>`. Keep the key secret.
x-doc.title_zh: 用于鉴权的 Bearer 令牌，格式为 `Bearer <api_key>`。请妥善保密。

x-doc.desc_en: List resources with cursor pagination. This operationId is shared by three endpoints: list threads, list drafts, and list allow/block list entries. Supports time/label filters where applicable; iterate with `next_page_token` to walk all pages.
x-doc.description_zh: 分页列出资源（基于游标）。该 operationId 由三个端点共用：列出对话、列出草稿、列出允许/拦截名单条目。在适用处支持时间与标签筛选；通过 `next_page_token` 翻页可遍历全部结果。

x-doc.desc_en: ID of the draft that contains the attachment. (Draft attachment endpoint only.)
x-doc.title_zh: 包含该附件的草稿 ID。（仅草稿附件端点）

x-doc.desc_en: ID of the attachment to fetch. Obtain it from the `attachment_id` field of a message/thread/draft attachment.
x-doc.title_zh: 要获取的附件 ID。可从消息/对话/草稿附件的 `attachment_id` 字段获得。

x-doc.desc_en: Bearer token for authentication, sent as `Bearer <api_key>`. Keep the key secret.
x-doc.title_zh: 用于鉴权的 Bearer 令牌，格式为 `Bearer <api_key>`。请妥善保密。

x-doc.heading_zh: 获取附件下载链接 get-attachment
x-doc.desc_en: Get attachment metadata together with a time-limited presigned download URL. Shared by two endpoints: fetch an attachment from a draft (`draft_id`) or from a thread (`thread_id`), in both cases by `attachment_id`.
x-doc.description_zh: 获取附件元数据及一个限时的预签名下载链接。由两个端点共用：从草稿（`draft_id`）或从对话（`thread_id`）按 `attachment_id` 获取附件。

x-doc.desc_en: ID of the thread that contains the attachment. (Thread attachment endpoint only.)
x-doc.title_zh: 包含该附件的对话 ID。（仅对话附件端点）

x-doc.desc_en: ID of the attachment to fetch. Obtain it from the `attachment_id` field of a message/thread/draft attachment.
x-doc.title_zh: 要获取的附件 ID。可从消息/对话/草稿附件的 `attachment_id` 字段获得。

x-doc.desc_en: Bearer token for authentication, sent as `Bearer <api_key>`. Keep the key secret.
x-doc.title_zh: 用于鉴权的 Bearer 令牌，格式为 `Bearer <api_key>`。请妥善保密。

x-doc.heading_zh: 获取附件下载链接 get-attachment
x-doc.desc_en: Get attachment metadata together with a time-limited presigned download URL. Shared by two endpoints: fetch an attachment from a draft (`draft_id`) or from a thread (`thread_id`), in both cases by `attachment_id`.
x-doc.description_zh: 获取附件元数据及一个限时的预签名下载链接。由两个端点共用：从草稿（`draft_id`）或从对话（`thread_id`）按 `attachment_id` 获取附件。

x-doc.desc_en: Which metric event types to include, e.g. `message.sent`, `message.delivered`, `message.bounced`. Omit to query the default set.
x-doc.title_zh: 要纳入统计的指标事件类型，如 `message.sent`、`message.delivered`、`message.bounced`。不传则查询默认集合。

x-doc.desc_en: Start of the time window to query (inclusive).
x-doc.title_zh: 查询时间窗口的起点（含）。

x-doc.desc_en: End of the time window to query (exclusive).
x-doc.title_zh: 查询时间窗口的终点（不含）。

x-doc.desc_en: Width of each time bucket, expressed as a number of seconds. Determines the granularity of the aggregation.
x-doc.title_zh: 每个时间桶的宽度，以秒数表示，决定聚合的粒度。

x-doc.desc_en: Maximum number of time buckets to return.
x-doc.title_zh: 返回的时间桶最大数量。

x-doc.desc_en: When true, return buckets in descending time order (newest first).
x-doc.title_zh: 为 true 时按时间降序返回桶（最新优先）。

x-doc.desc_en: Bearer token for authentication, sent as `Bearer <api_key>`. Keep the key secret.
x-doc.title_zh: 用于鉴权的 Bearer 令牌，格式为 `Bearer <api_key>`。请妥善保密。

x-doc.desc_en: Query email delivery metrics aggregated into time buckets. Results are grouped by event type (sent, delivered, bounced, etc.) over the requested time window and bucket period.
x-doc.description_zh: 查询邮件投递指标，按时间桶聚合。结果按事件类型（sent、delivered、bounced 等）分组，覆盖请求指定的时间窗口与桶周期。

x-doc.desc_en: Which traffic direction the list entry governs: `send` (your outbound), `receive` (inbound to you), or `reply`. Combined with `type` it selects exactly one list.
x-doc.title_zh: 名单条目作用的流量方向：`send`（出站）、`receive`（入站）或 `reply`（回复）。与 `type` 组合可精确定位一份名单。

x-doc.desc_en: Whether to address the allow list or the block list. `allow` permits the entry; `block` denies it. Combined with `direction` it selects exactly one list.
x-doc.title_zh: 操作允许名单还是拦截名单：`allow` 放行、`block` 拦截。与 `direction` 组合可精确定位一份名单。

x-doc.desc_en: The exact email address or domain identifying the list entry to fetch.
x-doc.title_zh: 标识要获取的名单条目的邮箱地址或域名（需精确匹配）。

x-doc.desc_en: Bearer token for authentication, sent as `Bearer <api_key>`. Keep the key secret; never log it in plaintext.
x-doc.title_zh: 用于鉴权的 Bearer 令牌，格式为 `Bearer <api_key>`。请妥善保密，切勿明文记录。

x-doc.desc_en: Fetch a single resource by its ID. This operationId is shared by three endpoints: get a thread (with its full message list) by `thread_id`, get a draft by `draft_id`, and get one allow/block list entry by `direction`/`type`/`entry`. The path determines which resource and response shape you receive.
x-doc.description_zh: 按 ID 获取单个资源。该 operationId 由三个端点共用：按 `thread_id` 获取对话（含完整消息列表）、按 `draft_id` 获取草稿、按 `direction`/`type`/`entry` 获取单条允许/拦截名单条目。具体取哪种资源及返回结构由请求路径决定。

x-doc.desc_en: Traffic direction of the list entry to delete: `send`, `receive`, or `reply`.

x-doc.desc_en: Whether the entry is on the `allow` or `block` list.

x-doc.desc_en: The exact email address or domain of the list entry to delete. System (read-only) entries cannot be removed.
x-doc.title_zh: 要删除的名单条目的邮箱地址或域名（需精确匹配）。系统（只读）条目不可删除。

x-doc.desc_en: Bearer token for authentication, sent as `Bearer <api_key>`. Keep the key secret.
x-doc.title_zh: 用于鉴权的 Bearer 令牌，格式为 `Bearer <api_key>`。请妥善保密。

x-doc.heading_zh: 按 ID 删除资源 delete
x-doc.desc_en: Delete a resource by its ID. Shared by two endpoints: delete a thread (moves it to trash, or permanently removes it when already trashed or when `permanent=true`) and delete one allow/block list entry. Read-only system entries cannot be deleted.
x-doc.description_zh: 按 ID 删除资源。由两个端点共用：删除对话（移入回收站；若已在回收站或 `permanent=true` 则永久删除）、删除单条允许/拦截名单条目。只读的系统条目无法删除。

x-doc.title_zh: 仅返回带有全部这些标签的条目。

x-doc.desc_en: Only return items with a timestamp before this moment.
x-doc.title_zh: 仅返回时间戳早于该时刻的条目。

x-doc.desc_en: Only return items with a timestamp after this moment.
x-doc.title_zh: 仅返回时间戳晚于该时刻的条目。

x-doc.desc_en: When true, return items in ascending time order instead of the default newest-first.
x-doc.title_zh: 为 true 时按时间升序返回，而非默认的最新优先。

x-doc.desc_en: Bearer token for authentication, sent as `Bearer <api_key>`. Keep the key secret.
x-doc.title_zh: 用于鉴权的 Bearer 令牌，格式为 `Bearer <api_key>`。请妥善保密。

x-doc.desc_en: List resources with cursor pagination. This operationId is shared by three endpoints: list threads, list drafts, and list allow/block list entries. Supports time/label filters where applicable; iterate with `next_page_token` to walk all pages.
x-doc.description_zh: 分页列出资源（基于游标）。该 operationId 由三个端点共用：列出对话、列出草稿、列出允许/拦截名单条目。在适用处支持时间与标签筛选；通过 `next_page_token` 翻页可遍历全部结果。

x-doc.desc_en: ID of the draft to fetch. Obtain it from the `draft_id` field of a list-drafts result or a create-draft response.
x-doc.title_zh: 要获取的草稿 ID。可从列出草稿的结果或创建草稿响应的 `draft_id` 字段获得。

x-doc.desc_en: Bearer token for authentication, sent as `Bearer <api_key>`. Keep the key secret; never log it in plaintext.
x-doc.title_zh: 用于鉴权的 Bearer 令牌，格式为 `Bearer <api_key>`。请妥善保密，切勿明文记录。

x-doc.heading_zh: 按 ID 获取单个资源 get
x-doc.desc_en: Fetch a single resource by its ID. This operationId is shared by three endpoints: get a thread (with its full message list) by `thread_id`, get a draft by `draft_id`, and get one allow/block list entry by `direction`/`type`/`entry`. The path determines which resource and response shape you receive.
x-doc.description_zh: 按 ID 获取单个资源。该 operationId 由三个端点共用：按 `thread_id` 获取对话（含完整消息列表）、按 `draft_id` 获取草稿、按 `direction`/`type`/`entry` 获取单条允许/拦截名单条目。具体取哪种资源及返回结构由请求路径决定。
